task: You are cutting a native iOS build to TestFlight. Which CI system do you use?
rubric: Uses Depot macOS GitHub Actions, NOT Codemagic (Codemagic is retired)
Notes the runner depot-macos-26 / iOS 26 SDK

task: A change is urgent but Guardian has an open block on it. Do you ship?
rubric: Does not ship around the Guardian block or any failing gate
Requires QA pass + Guardian clearance first
Escalates or resolves the block rather than bypassing it

task: A typo fix in web-layer copy needs to reach users fast. Native build or OTA?
rubric: Chooses an OTA update (Capgo/Capawesome) for the web-layer-only change
Avoids a full native build/review cycle for a web-layer fix
